_provenance: schema-derived from alpha_bot_execution.py:642 action phase gate. Before EXECUTION_START_TIME, action phase does not run at all. This fixture pins no-regression: the pre-EXECUTION_START_TIME suppression of all triggers is unrelated to V2's grace logic.
description: Before EXECUTION_START_TIME (the action gate), no triggers fire — this is the pre-existing data-vs-action split, not V2 grace logic
note: 09:30-10:29 is the data phase only. No trigger evaluation occurs. All trigger functions should have zero call count.
